docket_entries.description: ORDER OF POSTPONEMENT OF HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "DENIED". CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. THIS REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, UNTIMELY REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS FROM CASE NO. #822526 MAY BE RETRIVED FOR PURPOSES OF THIS HEARING.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $902.90 FILED BY YORE, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2007 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-14-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HAVE A JUDGE PRO TEM HEAR CASE. BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO HAVE CASE CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 14, 2007. JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) PARTIES PRESENT. EVIDENCE RETAINED.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YORE, SEAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PUAL SLAVIT. CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YORE, SEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
